prompts.label: Dockerfile for Node app
prompts.text:
Write a beginner Dockerfile for a simple Node Express app.

- FROM node:20-alpine, WORKDIR, COPY package*, npm ci, COPY ., CMD
- .dockerignore for node_modules
- docker build and docker run commands

Explain each instruction.

prompts.label: Dockerfile for Python app
prompts.text:
Dockerfile for a FastAPI or Flask app with uvicorn.

- Slim Python image, requirements.txt, expose port
- Run uvicorn command
- Build and run example

Keep layers minimal for learning.

prompts.label: docker-compose two services
prompts.text:
Create docker-compose.yml with web and postgres services.

- web builds from Dockerfile, depends_on db
- db uses postgres image with env POSTGRES_PASSWORD
- Volumes for db data

Explain docker compose up -d.

prompts.label: Environment variables in Compose
prompts.text:
Show .env with docker-compose for a web app.

- env_file: .env
- Do not commit secrets
- Variable substitution in compose

Example .env.example safe template.

prompts.label: Volumes for persistent data
prompts.text:

- Named volume for database
- When bind mount is useful for development

Short compose snippet.

prompts.label: Docker networks basics
prompts.text:
How do containers talk in Compose?

- Default network, service name as hostname
- Example: web connects to postgres://db:5432

Diagram in ASCII optional.

prompts.label: Multi-stage build smaller image
prompts.text:

- Stage 1 npm run build, stage 2 copy dist only
- Why image size matters

Simplified Dockerfile.

prompts.label: Debug container won't start
prompts.text:
Checklist when docker run fails for beginners.

- docker logs, docker ps -a
- Wrong port mapping -p 3000:3000
- File permissions and ENTRYPOINT typos

5–7 bullet fixes.

prompts.label: .dockerignore essentials
prompts.text:

- node_modules, .git, .env, __pycache__, dist
- Why smaller context speeds build

Full file content.

prompts.label: Dev vs prod containers
prompts.text:
Explain dev vs production Docker workflow.

- Dev: bind mount source, hot reload
- Prod: slim image, no dev dependencies
- Mention compose.override.yml idea

Conceptual, 2 scenarios.
